P-Value Formatting Styles

Source: R/p_format_utils.R
p_format_styles.Rd

Predefined p-value formatting styles based on major scientific publication standards and citation styles.

Usage

.p_format_styles

Format

An object of class list of length 7.

Details

The following styles are available:

  • default: Current behavior with scientific notation (backward compatible)

  • apa: APA Style - no leading zero, 3 decimals, threshold at 0.001

  • nejm: New England Journal of Medicine - leading zero, 3 decimals, threshold at 0.001

  • lancet: The Lancet - leading zero, 4 decimals, threshold at 0.0001

  • ama: American Medical Association - no leading zero, 3 decimals, threshold at 0.001

  • graphpad: GraphPad Prism - leading zero, 4 decimals, threshold at 0.0001

  • scientific: Scientific notation for genomics/GWAS studies
